title: Canvas Items, Tags, Layers, Rendering, and Redraw
description: Redraw duplicates thousands of line items, solver marks cover walls, stale IDs are mutated, and hit testing scans every object. Learners cumulatively produce tagged layered Canvas render plan through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish retained Canvas items, integer IDs, tags, configuration, coordinates, stacking order, and deletion.
Define wall, terrain, solution, focus, annotation, and status layers with stable stacking rules.
Use semantic tags for groups and stable model keys rather than retaining fragile positional ID lists.
